messages.author: skykingisepic
messages.text: Decided to take a stab at building FW. I have a T-LoRa Supreme running Companion Wanted to connect via WiFi Installed Visual Studio Code and PlatformIO Duplicated T_Beam_S3_Supreme_SX1262_companion_radio_ble and changed ble to wifi Added: -D WIFI_DEBUG_LOGGING=1 -D WIFI_SSID='"ssid"' -D WIFI_PWD='"pwd"' Ran ./build.sh build-firmware T_Beam_S3_Supreme_SX1262_companion_radio_wifi Created a firmware.bin file Flashed it T-Beam is now connected to WiFi and I'm connected to it in linux desktop app and tried mobile app too. I did notice that it takes multiple tries to login as Remote Admin to my Repeater or get Repeater Status. More than when connected via BLE (edited)
messages.content_html: Decided to take a stab at building FW. I have a T-LoRa Supreme running Companion Wanted to connect via WiFi Installed Visual Studio Code and PlatformIO Duplicated T_Beam_S3_Supreme_SX1262_companion_radio_ble and changed ble to wifi Added: -D WIFI_DEBUG_LOGGING=1 -D WIFI_SSID='"ssid"' -D WIFI_PWD='"pwd"' Ran ./build.sh build-firmware T_Beam_S3_Supreme_SX1262_companion_radio_wifi Created a firmware.bin file Flashed it T-Beam is now connected to WiFi and I'm connected to it in linux desktop app and tried mobile app too. I did notice that it takes multiple tries to login as Remote Admin to my Repeater or get Repeater Status. More than when connected via BLE (edited)

messages.author: skykingisepic
messages.text: ENVVARS to the rescue! That's a really cool shortcut and I assume works with all ESP variants that support WiFI. (edited)
